title: Walls
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Walls''' was a famous [[Artist/Legends|artist]] from the [[Elrood sector/Legends|Elrood sector]], known for being brilliant but highly temperamental. Walls' [[Painting/Legends|work]], "[[The Lovers' Dilemma]]," was one of the most famous and popular works on display in the [[Professiona Artists Guild]]'s booth in [[Elrood Bazaar]]. The piece was a mixed media [[mood chamber]] and [[Holopainting/Legends|holographic painting]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 1993-09-XX -->''[[Planets of the Galaxy, Volume Three]]'' {{1stm}}
*<!-- 1994-11-XX -->''[[The Star Wars Planets Collection]]''
